channel.title: Micro Offer Studio Updates
channel.description: Generated offers, tools, and paid-inquiry paths. Confirmed earned money remains $0 until external proof exists.

item.title: Website Audit Microservice
item.description: Public website, landing-page, accessibility, mobile, copy, and QA quick-win audits. One accepted audit clears $100.

item.title: Data Cleanup Sprint
item.description: CSV/spreadsheet cleanup with normalized output, validation counts, and a short QA report. One completed sprint clears $100.

item.title: AI Workflow Tracker Sprint
item.description: A CSV-backed tracker and static HTML dashboard for interviews, leads, grants, or sales pipelines. One fixed-price order clears $100.

item.title: Static Demo Site Customization
item.description: A polished one-page starter site customized for a local service business. One starter site clears $100.

item.title: Niche Quote Estimator
item.description: A browser-only quote estimator customized for a simple service pricing model. One custom estimator clears $100.

item.title: Automation Blueprint
item.description: Trigger, data field, step, failure-case, and test-plan blueprint for a repetitive workflow. One blueprint reaches $100.

item.title: CSV Cleaner Lite
item.description: Free tool leading to Data Cleanup Sprint at $125. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the full Data Cleanup Sprint and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Website Audit Lite
item.description: Free tool leading to Website Audit Microservice at $150. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the full Website Audit Microservice and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Workflow Blueprint Lite
item.description: Free tool leading to Automation Blueprint at $100. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the full Automation Blueprint and external payment proof exists.

item.title: AI Workflow Tracker Brief Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to AI Workflow Tracker Sprint at $150. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the AI Workflow Tracker Sprint and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Static Demo Site Brief Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Static Demo Site Customization at $200. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Static Demo Site Customization and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Quote Estimator Scope Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Niche Quote Estimator at $150. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Niche Quote Estimator and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Local SEO/GBP Brief Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Local SEO / GBP Audit at $175. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Local SEO / GBP Audit and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Client Intake/SOP Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Client Intake and SOP Package at $125. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Client Intake and SOP Package and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Career Packet Brief Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Resume / LinkedIn / Interview Pack at $125. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Resume / LinkedIn / Interview Pack and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Invoice/Expense Snapshot
item.description: Free tool leading to Invoice and Expense Tracker Template at $19. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the full tracker template or a paid transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Prompt Workflow Brief Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Prompt Workflow Pack at $19. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Prompt Workflow Pack or a $100 custom setup and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Resale Listing Draft Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Resale Listing and Price Research Pack at $100. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Resale Listing and Price Research Pack and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Proposal/Profile Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Sales Enablement Kit at $29. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Sales Enablement Kit or a $100 customized proposal/profile setup and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Localization QA Brief Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Translation and Localization Draft Pack at $100. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Translation and Localization Draft Pack and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Subscription Savings Calculator
item.description: Free tool leading to Subscription Audit and Savings Prep Pack at $100. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Subscription Audit and Savings Prep Pack or account-owner savings are externally verified.

item.title: Content Repurposing Brief Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Content Repurposing Sprint at $100. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Content Repurposing Sprint and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Technical Docs Audit Brief Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Technical Docs Cleanup at $150. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Technical Docs Cleanup sprint and external payment proof exists.

item.title: PDF/Table Intake Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to PDF/Table Extraction at $125. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the PDF/Table Extraction package and external payment proof exists.

item.title: HTML5 Micro Game Kit Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to HTML5 Micro Game Kit at $19. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the HTML5 Micro Game Kit transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Procedural SFX Pack Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Procedural SFX Pack at $12. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Procedural SFX Pack transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: SVG Icon Pack Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to SVG Icon Pack at $15. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the SVG Icon Pack transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Printable Puzzle and Planner Pack Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Printable Puzzle and Planner Pack at $14. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Printable Puzzle and Planner Pack transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Synthetic Mock Dataset Pack Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Synthetic Mock Dataset Pack at $19. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Synthetic Mock Dataset Pack transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Browser Extension Template Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Browser Extension Template at $29. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Browser Extension Template transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: CSV CLI Toolkit Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to CSV CLI Toolkit at $19. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the CSV CLI Toolkit transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: CSS Component Pack Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to CSS Component Pack at $19. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the CSS Component Pack transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: SVG Wallpaper Pattern Pack Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to SVG Wallpaper Pattern Pack at $9. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the SVG Wallpaper Pattern Pack transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Anki-Ready Flashcard Deck Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Anki-Ready Flashcard Deck at $12. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Anki-Ready Flashcard Deck transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: Mini Course Workbook Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to Mini Course Workbook at $29. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the Mini Course Workbook transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: JSON Schema Fixture Pack Preview Builder
item.description: Free tool leading to JSON Schema Fixture Pack at $15. Counts $0 until a buyer requests the JSON Schema Fixture Pack transfer and external payment proof exists.

item.title: GitHub lead repo: Automation Blueprint Starter
item.description: One paid Automation Blueprint order clears $100 before fees/refunds. Money still counts $0 until external payment proof exists.

item.title: GitHub lead repo: Browser Extension Template Preview
item.description: Four paid browser-extension template transfers gross at least $100 before fees/refunds. Money still counts $0 until external payment proof exists.

item.description: One paid Resume / LinkedIn / Interview Pack order clears $100 before fees/refunds. Money still counts $0 until external payment proof exists.
